title: Implement compact CoT encoder/decoder
description: Binary CoT codec per spec/07-transport-app.md Section 10.1.1. PLI encoding (18 bytes), chat with dest_type (broadcast/team/direct), team enumeration. Software-only: pure codec work with test vectors.
close_reason: Rust implementation complete at rust/lichen-core/src/compact_cot.rs with 20 tests passing.
